project_description: Make every field that became optional in the КП creation modal editable inside the existing КП card after creation: pickup country, city, incoterms, currency, VAT rate, and cargo places (with full CRUD per place). Symmetric with the deferred-fill workflow: КП is created with supplier+buyer only, the rest is filled in once the supplier replies. Reuses existing updateInvoice mutation; adds CRUD mutations for invoice_cargo_places.
